title: Vertical Lunge
description: Allows the lunge enchantment to launch you vertically
body:
Vertical Lunge tweaks the vanilla Lunge enchantment so it can launch you upward as well as forward, instead of being locked to horizontal movement only.

In vanilla Minecraft, Lunge forcibly removes all vertical motion, even if you’re looking up. This mod removes that limitation.

This mod is also server side, meaning clients don't need the mod installed for it to work, as long as the server has it installed.
